title: Duolingo Totem
description: Bring Duolingo to Minecraft Bedrock! Replace your Totem of Undying with the green owl and survive every lesson of life. Fun, meme-style texture pack.
body:
# Duolingo Minecraft Texture Pack (Totem of Undying Replacement)

Learn or perish! The Duolingo Minecraft Texture Pack brings the iconic green owl straight into your world. This custom Minecraft Bedrock texture pack replaces the classic Totem of Undying with a glowing Duolingo totem — perfect for meme lovers and Duolingo fans alike.

Every time you cheat death, Duolingo reminds you to keep practicing!
Stay alive in style, surprise your friends, and show the true power of daily lessons.
![Duolingo Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac1f0efefa957f5ebe78f818bd20e940df2e3bb8_0.webp)
Paquete de Texturas Duolingo para Minecraft (Reemplazo del Tótem de la Inmortalidad)

## Español

El paquete de texturas Duolingo para Minecraft lleva al icónico búho verde directamente a tu mundo. Este pack para Minecraft Bedrock reemplaza el clásico Tótem de la Inmortalidad por un tótem personalizado de Duolingo con un diseño brillante y divertido.
